subject: UW-Eau Claire student building salon websites
body:
Hey there,

I came across Headlines Salon & Spa while looking for salons in Minneapolis and noticed you're using Meevo for booking. I'd love to build you a proper website that integrates with your Meevo system—something that showcases your work beyond just the booking page.

I'm a UW-Eau Claire student building my portfolio, so I'd create a custom site for you at a student rate. We could hop on a quick call and I'd show you exactly what I'm thinking.

If it's not a fit, no hard feelings—just trying to get some real experience under my belt.

Let me know if you're interested.

Best,
Justice
715-308-7949
https://justicewastaken.github.io/forward-media/
